This website uses cookies
We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services.

About
Cookies are small text files that can be used by websites to make a user's experience more efficient.

The law states that we can store cookies on your device if they are strictly necessary for the operation of this site. For all other types of cookies we need your permission.

This site uses different types of cookies. Some cookies are placed by third party services that appear on our pages.

You can at any time change or withdraw your consent from the Cookie Declaration on our website.

Learn more about who we are, how you can contact us and how we process personal data in our Privacy Policy.

Please state your consent ID and date when you contact us regarding your consent.

About the Book

Steps & Dates

Submission Terms

Publishing Benefits

Open Access Book - Call for Chapters

Animal Feed Science and Feeding Strategies

Isbn: 978-1-80632-492-7

Issn: 2632-0517

Part of the Book Series: Veterinary Medicine and Science

Series editor: Rita Payan-Carreira

Deadlines

Chapter Proposal Submission

05 April 2026

Full Chapter Submission

02 June 2026

Register your participation as an author by 05 April 2026

Register

More than 6,500 authors from Northern Europe have published with IntechOpen so far.

About the Book

This open access book will be an integrated collection of chapters that present new areas of research or novel syntheses of existing research and, as such, represent perspectives from various international authors. With IntechOpen, your work will be permanently available online, free to download, share, and read.

Academic Editor

Figen Kırkpınar

Ege University,
Turkey

View more

A researcher specialising in animal feed and nutrition. The primary focus of her research endeavours pertains to the domain of feeds and animal nutrition, with a particular emphasis on feed additives, sustainable poultry nutrition, biotechnology, and the quality of meat and eggs.

Co-Editors

Helin Atan Çırpıcı

Ege University,
Turkey

View more

Dr. Çırpıc's research focuses on feed additives, sustainable poultry nutrition, biotechnological feeding strategies, and general animal nutrition.

Introduction to the Scope of the Book

This book will focus on the definition, classification, and composition of animal feeds and additives. It will also cover details about the nutritional components and characteristics of roughage and concentrates.

Furthermore, it will explain the role of feedstuffs and additives in livestock nutrition. Another objective will be to demonstrate recent technological trends in feed production processes (e.g., heating, flaking, crushing, and ensiling).

The book will also discuss some of the issues that the feed industry has focused on in recent years, such as sustainability and alternative protein sources. Novel methods and concepts for feed safety assessment will be examined, as will approaches for improving and enhancing feed utilisation, particularly of non-conventional feed materials. We hope that this book will serve as a valuable source of knowledge on animal husbandry and the feed sector, providing readers with useful insights. This book will provide a comprehensive and up-to-date overview of animal feed and modern feeding practices across livestock and poultry production systems.

Overall, the project will seek to offer a reliable resource that supports informed decision-making in animal nutrition and contributes to the advancement of efficient, safe, and sustainable feeding strategies. Designed for students, researchers, and industry professionals, it will explain the nutritional principles that guide feed formulation, the characteristics and evaluation of common and alternative feed ingredients, and the role of feed additives in optimizing health and performance. The book will also aim to bridge scientific knowledge with practical application by presenting current challenges in feed manufacture, sustainability, and regulatory frameworks.

Subject areas and keywords

Feed Ingredients

Nutritional Value

Feed Processing

Manufacturing

Feed Safety

Quality Assurance

Feed Additives

Environmental Issues

Sustainability Issues

Precision Feeding Technologies

Antibiotic-Free Production Systems

Voices From Our Community

Balancing academic pressures with manuscript preparation can be challenging. However, IntechOpen's Publishing Process Manager and Technical Editors provided exceptional support throughout the submission and review process. Their flexibility in allowing ample time for revisions and incorporating our suggestions significantly improved the chapter. I look forward to future publishing opportunities with IntechOpen.

Dr Marco Palomino

University of Aberdeen, UK

Additional Benefit

Print-on-demand

In addition to providing access via online platforms, your book will be made available via print-on-demand, to meet the needs of those preferring a traditional format, available through IntechOpen and different global channels (Amazon, Ingram, BOD, etc.). All IntechOpen contributors can buy print copies at an exclusive discounted price.

Books are hardbound and printed in full colour on FSC-certified paper, complying with principles of responsible forestry worldwide.

Join Our Community

Join our global network of 202,000+ authors and editors — including highly cited scientists, emerging researchers, and Nobel Laureates — who have successfully published with IntechOpen. Discover more here.

Memberships And Partnerships

Chapter Processing Charge

€1650

Flat rate Chapter Processing Charge (CPC) for manuscripts up to 20 pages.

Gold OA Publisher

IntechOpen is a gold open access publisher and authors and/or their institutions are requested to pay a one-time open access publishing fee following acceptance, after peer review, to allow for the work to be permanently accessible online.

To explore our global network of authors, editors and institutional agreements, click here.

Policies

To participate in this open access book and submit your work, you will have to log in to our submission and peer-review tracking system. If you don't already have an account, you will have to create one. Please consult the Privacy Policy.

We accept theoretical and applied scientific works that can be presented as original research or review papers. You can extend your research in a chapter format or present a state-of-the-art review of the latest research in your field. The required length of the full chapters is 10-20 pages. We will consider only submissions written in English. IntechOpen does not republish previously published works. Every work undergoes a plagiarism and AI usage detection check. You can consult our Submission Guidelines here.

All IntechOpen chapters are published under a Creative Commons License, which means that the authors keep the rights to their own work. Please consult the Publication Agreement here.

For a complete overview of IntechOpen Editorial Policies, please refer here.

Register to our submission and peer-review tracking system

Register to submit

Kristina, your personal Publishing Process Manager, will guide you through your publishing process. Our unique approach will foresee day-to-day support and the tools you need to make your work accessible worldwide.

Email questions to - kristina.k@intechopen.com

11 March 2024
IntechOpen Signs Open Access Institutional Agreement with Iowa State University

IntechOpen signs an institutional agreement with Iowa State University of Science and Technology to support open access and cover open access publishing fees for their faculty.

Read more
28 March 2023
IntechOpen Book Wins the 2022 International Academy of Astronautics Life Science Book Award

We are thrilled that the International Academy of Astronautics has chosen IntechOpen's book "Preparation of Space Experiments", edited by Dr. Vladimir Pletser, to receive the IAA Life Science Book Award. The award is given annually to recognize excellence in publication by an Academy member or corresponding member in the field of life sciences.

Read more
17 February 2023
IntechOpen Retains Its Dominant Position in Growing OA Market

In their analysis of the latest data from the Directory of Open Access Books (DOAB), Delta Think, a strategic consulting and advisory firm, confirmed that IntechOpen remains the largest publisher across all years, with a share of 9.6%.

Read more
